items.br: Disponibiliza career sites com templates, temas visuais e idioma padrao. Base para gestao de portais de carreiras e employer branding.
items.en: Provides career sites with templates, visual themes, and default language. Basis for career portal management and employer branding.
items.es: Proporciona career sites con templates, temas visuales e idioma predeterminado. Base para gestión de portales de carreras y employer branding.
